title: Senior Data Analyst
description: We are looking for a Senior Data Analyst to join our analytics team. You will work with SQL, Python, Tableau, and Snowflake to build dashboards, analyze customer behavior, and drive data-informed decisions. Requirements: 5+ years of analytics experience, strong SQL and Python skills, experience with cloud data platforms (AWS, Snowflake), Tableau or Power BI proficiency. Remote position with H1B sponsorship available.

title: Technical Program Manager
description: Stripe is hiring a Technical Program Manager to lead cross-functional data platform initiatives. You'll partner with engineering, product, and data science teams to deliver scalable solutions. Requirements: 7+ years in program management, experience with agile/scrum, JIRA, Confluence, stakeholder management, roadmap planning. Strong technical background in data infrastructure, ETL pipelines, and cloud services (AWS/GCP). H1B visa sponsorship provided.

title: Data Program Manager
description: Join Databricks as a Data Program Manager overseeing our analytics and data governance programs. You will drive program execution across engineering and analytics teams, manage roadmaps, and ensure delivery of key data platform milestones. Required: SQL, Python, data modeling experience, cross-functional leadership, agile methodology. Snowflake and dbt experience preferred.

title: Analytics Manager
description: Coinbase is seeking an Analytics Manager to lead our financial analytics team. Build KPI dashboards, develop statistical models, and partner with business stakeholders to drive strategic decisions. Requirements: 8+ years analytics experience, SQL, Python, Tableau, financial services domain expertise, regulatory reporting, risk analytics. H1B sponsorship available for qualified candidates.

title: Senior Program Manager, Data Platform
description: Databricks is looking for a Senior Program Manager to lead data platform programs. You will manage complex cross-functional initiatives, drive OKRs, and coordinate between engineering, product, and customer success. Requirements: 10+ years program management, strong technical background, experience with data pipelines (Spark, Airflow, ETL), cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP), agile leadership.

title: Business Data Analyst
description: Chime is hiring a Business Data Analyst to support our operations team. Analyze customer data, build dashboards in Tableau, develop data models, and provide actionable insights. Requirements: 5+ years data analysis, SQL, Python, Tableau, Excel, Snowflake. Experience in fintech preferred. Strong communication and stakeholder management skills.

title: Data Engineer
description: Join Airbnb's data engineering team to build and maintain scalable data pipelines. Work with Spark, Airflow, Snowflake, dbt, and AWS to process petabytes of data. Requirements: 5+ years data engineering, Python, SQL, Spark, Airflow, cloud data warehousing, data modeling. H1B visa sponsorship available.

title: Program Manager, Analytics
description: Anthropic is seeking a Program Manager for our analytics organization. Lead programs that improve data quality, analytics infrastructure, and business intelligence. Requirements: 7+ years program management, SQL, cross-functional leadership, stakeholder management, agile/scrum, roadmap planning. Experience with data governance and dashboard development preferred.

title: Data Analyst, Risk & Compliance
description: Robinhood is hiring a Data Analyst for our Risk & Compliance division. Analyze regulatory data, build compliance dashboards, and support risk modeling efforts. Requirements: SQL, Python, Tableau, financial services experience, regulatory reporting, data modeling. Strong analytical and communication skills required.

title: TPM - Data Infrastructure
description: Datadog is hiring a TPM for Data Infrastructure programs. Drive execution of large-scale data platform initiatives, coordinate cross-functional teams, manage program timelines and risks. Requirements: 8+ years TPM/program management experience, strong technical background in data systems, SQL, Python, ETL, data warehouse architecture. Agile/Scrum, JIRA expertise required.

title: Analytics Engineer
description: Figma is looking for an Analytics Engineer to build analytics infrastructure. Design dbt models, optimize Snowflake data warehouse, create self-serve analytics tools. Requirements: SQL, Python, dbt, Snowflake, data modeling, ETL/ELT pipelines. Experience preferred. H1B sponsorship available.

title: Senior Data Analyst, Marketing
description: Coinbase is hiring a Senior Data Analyst to support our marketing analytics team. Build dashboards, run A/B tests, analyze campaign performance, and provide data-driven recommendations. Requirements: SQL, Python, Tableau, statistical analysis, A/B testing, data modeling. Experience in fintech or crypto preferred.
